title: Episodic & Semantic Long-Term Memory
content:
# Interview Prep: Long-Term Memory

## Q1: How does long-term retrieval routing prevent irrelevant memories from polluting the context window?

### Standard Answer
We apply distance thresholds (e.g. cosine distance < 0.35) and limit retrieval size ($K=3$). This prevents low-similarity, irrelevant memories from cluttering the context window.
